productDisplayName: Timex Expedition Men Silver Toned Analogue & Digital Watch
description: Case style: Analogue and digital watch with circular stainless steel case, has a fixed bezel with markingsDial style: Blue dial, has white and steel toned markings, steel toned hour and minute hands with glow-in-the-dark inlay, orange seconds hand, digital display, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the time, alarm, countdown timer, stopwatch, calendar, dual time zone, Indiglo night light, four push buttons to reset the featuresStrap style: Steel toned, bracelet style strap secured with a butterfly claspWater resistant up to 100 metresComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
